---
title: "Factiva"
page-layout: article
---

# Factiva

**Provider:** EBSCO

## Description

Global news database with current and archival coverage from newspapers, magazines, newswires, and business sources. Supports news, company, industry, and policy research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Government & Public Policy, News & Media
- **Data/resource type:** Company & Organization Data, News & Current Events, Real Estate & Property Data
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Company & Organization Data, News & Current Events, Real Estate & Property Data

## Access notes

Per our license agreement, Factiva may not be used for text mining projects.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://yale.idm.oclc.org/login?URL=http://hdl.handle.net/10079/yuldb/yuldb493)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
